masterAgnostic.name: Is Master World for Agnostic Settings?
masterAgnostic.hint: If enabled, this world will be the master world for system agnostic settings, users, and system agnostic modules.

masterSystem.name: Is Master World for System Settings?
masterSystem.hint: If enabled, this world will be the master world for system settings, users, and system modules.

autoCheckSync.name: Auto Check Sync
autoCheckSync.hint: If enabled, this world will automatically check for changes to agnostic and system settings on startup.

autoPerformSync.name: Auto Perform Sync
autoPerformSync.hint: If enabled, this world will automatically save agnostic and system settings to file on startup.

silentUpload.name: Silent Upload
silentUpload.hint: If enabled, this world will not notify you when saving agnostic and system settings to file.

settingsSync.name: Synchronization Manager
settingsSync.label: Open Synchronization Manager
settingsSync.hint: Open the synchronization manager to save or load agnostic and system settings.

syncModules.name: Synchronize Modules
syncModules.hint: If enabled, this world will synchronize active modules.

syncUsers.name: Synchronize Users
syncUsers.hint: If enabled, this world will synchronize users between.

syncSettings.name: Synchronize Settings
syncSettings.hint: If enabled, this world will synchronize settings.

exclusionList.name: Exclusion List
exclusionList.label: Open Exclusion List
exclusionList.hint: Open the exclusion list to exclude modules, users, and settings from synchronization.
exclusionList.title: Exclusion List
exclusionList.info:
This list will be used to exclude modules, system, and core settings from synchronization.
On a Master world, exclusions will not be saved to the synchronization file.
On a non-Master world, exclusions will be ignored when loading settings from the synchronization file.

confirm.content: Are you sure you want to procede? This operation is not reversible.
